---
title: 'Patterns and Trends'
date: '2012-11-01T05:01:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '271570786820222912'
blogger_filename: '/2012/10/patterns-and-trends.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Feelings'
---

I just noticed a pattern...<br />
<br />
I don't like pressure.<br />
<br />
I DO like teaching people that WANT to learn.<br />
<br />
I don't like pressuring OTHER people either. I don't like "Sales" at all. I don't like myself for being a sales person so I do everything I can to distance myself from the very role I was hired for... eesh... no wonder I'm so bad at it...<br />
<br />
How can I TRY to enjoy this job, or hate it less, and still help people and still meet numbers?
